interaction_phrase: established by the National Quantum Initiative Act
occurrence_sentence: The NSTC Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science was established by the National Quantum Initiative Act and coordinates Federal R&D in quantum information science and related technologies under the auspices of the NSTC Committee on Science.

interaction_phrase: providing technical and administrative support
occurrence_sentence: The NQCO is tasked with providing technical and administrative support to the SCQIS, ESIX, and the NQIAC, overseeing interagency coordination of the NQI Program, serving as the point of contact on Federal civilian QIS activities, ensuring coordination among the consortium and quantum centers, and conducting public outreach.

interaction_phrase: providing technical and administrative support

interaction_phrase: NSF Quantum Leap Challenge Institutes (QLCI)
occurrence_sentence: Much of the growth in QIS R&D budgets since 2019 is for NQI activities such as the establishment of a quantum consortium by NIST, the NSF Quantum Leap Challenge Institutes (QLCI), the DOE National Quantum Information Science Research Centers (NQISRCs), expansion of the DOD QIS research program, and the coordination and strengthening of core QIS programs across agencies.

occurrence_sentence: The NQI Act calls on NSF to support QIS centers and coordinate core programs to accelerate QIS research and education.

interaction_phrase: a $20M award for a National Quantum Nanofab (NQN) facility
occurrence_sentence: NSF announced a $20M award for a National Quantum Nanofab (NQN) facility to accelerate co-design and development of atomic and photonic quantum devices.

interaction_phrase: DOE National Laboratories are a network of outstanding intellectual assets
occurrence_sentence: The DOE National Laboratories are a network of outstanding intellectual assets, unique among world scientific institutions, that also serve as engines of economic growth regionally and across the country.

interaction_phrase: authorized by the NQI Act
occurrence_sentence: As authorized by the NQI Act, DOE established five National Quantum Information Science Research Centers (NQISRCs).

interaction_phrase: supported by the DOE FES and led by Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: A research team supported by the DOE FES and led by Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory has developed a method that programs the formation of qubits in silicon for large-scale manufacturing using a femtosecond laser.

interaction_phrase: JPL is developing a narrow-scope ground testbed to provide support and training
occurrence_sentence: For BECCAL, JPL is developing a narrow-scope ground testbed to provide support and training prior to a fully DLR-provided ground testbed system delivered to JPL.

interaction_phrase: a fully DLR-provided ground testbed system delivered to JPL
occurrence_sentence: For BECCAL, JPL is developing a narrow-scope ground testbed to provide support and training prior to a fully DLR-provided ground testbed system delivered to JPL.

interaction_phrase: spearheaded efforts to support
occurrence_sentence: Based on the importance of QIS to national security, LPS has spearheaded efforts to support the NQI and contribute to the goals of the National Strategy for QIS.

target_actor: Air Force Office of Scientific Research (AFOSR)
interaction_phrase: in partnership with
occurrence_sentence: LPS sponsors extramural research projects that target fundamental questions needed to understand the potential of quantum computing and grow robust, interconnected research communities at universities, laboratories, and commercial enterprises, both directly and in partnership with ARO, AFOSR, and other agencies.
target_actor_key: air force office of scientific research

interaction_phrase: with support from the NQCO
occurrence_sentence: The SCQIS, with support from the NQCO, utilizes quantum.gov to help coordinate and showcase NQI activities.

interaction_phrase: hosted by DOE
occurrence_sentence: The SCQIS Science IWG and NQCO convened the sixth Federal QIS Program Day, hosted by DOE, bringing together QIS program managers, researchers, and stakeholders from across the Government to discuss projects and directions for QIS R&D.

interaction_phrase: SCQIS Science IWG and NQCO
occurrence_sentence: The SCQIS Science IWG and NQCO convened the sixth Federal QIS Program Day, hosted by DOE, bringing together QIS program managers, researchers, and stakeholders from across the Government to discuss projects and directions for QIS R&D.

interaction_phrase: SCQIS Quantum Networking IWG
occurrence_sentence: The SCQIS Quantum Networking IWG (QN-IWG) facilitates the implementation of the National Strategy for A Coordinated Approach to Quantum Networking.

interaction_phrase: co-sponsor
occurrence_sentence: NSA's LQC joined NSF to co-sponsor the Q-12 partnership.

interaction_phrase: NQI Other Transaction Authority
occurrence_sentence: In 2019, NIST established the Quantum Economic Development Consortium (QED-C) using its NQI Other Transaction Authority to enable and grow a robust commercial quantum-based industry and associated supply chain in the United States.

interaction_phrase: NSF's Mid-Scale Research Infrastructure 1 (Mid-scale RI-1) program
occurrence_sentence: Funded as part of NSF's Mid-Scale Research Infrastructure 1 (Mid-scale RI-1) program, NQN will be an open-access national facility for academic, Government, and industrial users.

interaction_phrase: NSC, NQCO, and State Department launched
occurrence_sentence: The National Security Council (NSC), NQCO, and State Department launched the Quantum Development Group in July 2024, convening high-level Government officials from Australia, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Japan, Republic of Korea, United Kingdom, and the United States to discuss approaches to QIS and opportunities and challenges for Governments and the private sector to enhance QIS sector resilience and deepen cooperation.

interaction_phrase: signed into law by the President
occurrence_sentence: The NQI was introduced in Congress, passed in the House, passed in the Senate, and signed into law by the President, reflecting bipartisan support.

interaction_phrase: with support from the NQCO and information from the NQI Advisory Committee
occurrence_sentence: and ESIX, with support from the NQCO and information from the NQI Advisory Committee, will work to identify the most important metrics to chart progress towards NQI Program goals and priorities.
